title: gleam_erlang_ffi — selector system
purpose: gleam_erlang's process module wraps selective receive with a typed selector abstraction. This is the foundation of gleam_otp's actor message loop.
task: Implement selector system as native Rust BIFs under gleam_erlang_ffi MFAs.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement non-selector gleam_erlang_ffi functions (B-031)
SHALL NOT implement ETS or persistent_term
SHALL NOT modify the mailbox implementation

requirements.title: new_selector/0 and basic structure
requirements.spec: new_selector/0 returns empty list. Selector is a list of {Tag, Handler} tuples.
acceptance: Selector is a standard BEAM list

requirements.title: insert/map/merge/remove selector handlers
requirements.spec: insert_selector_handler/3 prepends entry, map_selector/2 wraps handlers, merge_selector/2 concatenates, remove_selector_handler/2 removes by tag.

requirements.title: select/1 and select/2
requirements.spec: select/1 scans mailbox against selector handlers. First match consumes message and returns handler result. No match suspends. select/2 adds timeout.
